_about: Curated keepers — the gems worth remembering. Hand-edited. `url` is the groups string (live at ../?groups=<url>); `lens` records which explore.mjs lens surfaced it (or 'reference'). Render with: node montage.mjs (reads this file). The on-ramp to gallery.html / presets[].

keepers.name: Red & Black
keepers.note: the classic interlocking knight tessellation with the solid red box — the default

keepers.name: Big Sky
keepers.note: huge solid field, one jagged shard, only a handful of island defects

keepers.name: Lightning Crack
keepers.note: solid field split by a single red crack + a tiny defect cluster — minimal/dramatic

keepers.name: Diagonal Bugs
keepers.note: solid field studded with small clustered diagonal islands — kin to the original three-bugs find

keepers.name: Circuit Bar
keepers.note: a domain crossed by a diagonal circuit-board bar

keepers.name: Quadrant Cross
keepers.note: teal field, red quadrant, a clean central cross axis

keepers.name: Compass
keepers.note: a big diagonal X starburst of textured defects from the center

keepers.name: Bowtie
keepers.note: four-fold pattern with a fuzzy diagonal cross

keepers.name: Torn Paper
keepers.note: muted quadrants with a noisy torn center

keepers.name: Flower Burst
keepers.note: purple/teal/green wedges around a chaotic flower core, 7 colors

keepers.name: Spider
keepers.note: yellow/gray field with a purple spider-burst, 6 colors

keepers.name: Kaleidoscope
keepers.note: 8-color radial with a strong central cross

keepers.name: Conduit
keepers.note: purple/teal/red with a black diagonal circuit bar, 5 colors

keepers.name: Sunburst
keepers.note: red/teal 8-fold sunburst with a textured core
